# Data Model: pixflatave


average pixel-to-pixel flat fields for BOSS


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example HDUS List](#example-hdus-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
average pixel-to-pixel flat fields for BOSS produced from multiple lossy fiber flat frames

### Naming Convention
$SPECFLAT_DIR/[SPECFLAT_VER]/flats/pixflatave-[MJD]-[BR][ID].fits

### Releases
IPL4, DR20

### Enviroments
SPECFLAT_DIR

### Approximate Size
46 MB

### File Type
FITS

### Generated by Product
idlspec2d - spflatave.pro

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
1.1.1

### HDUS List for release DR20
  - [HDU0: 60516/sdR-b2-00037187.fit.gz](#hdu0-60516/sdr-b2-00037187.fit.gz)

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another
 - DR20
   - from: IPL4
   - note: No changes
